message:
feat(storage): tick 174 hot-path singleton writes route through send_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-fifth post-storage tick. 5 more `_with_cx` storage writes
inlined — the highest-frequency hot-path writes in the tree.

Migrated:
- record_event_with_cx (pattern-detection write path)
- record_audit_action_with_cx (audit trail — 14+ call sites)
- insert_approval_token_with_cx (approval issuance)
- upsert_pane_with_cx (pane discovery — the MOST-called storage
  mutation in the codebase, 29+ call sites)
- insert_step_log_with_cx (workflow step logging, 13-field struct)

`record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx` already routes through
`record_audit_action_with_cx` (this tick's migration target), so
it transitively bypasses the orphan-cx hole now — no separate
change needed.

Running tally through send_with_cx:
- Tick 169: 6 (event-annotation)
- Tick 170: 6 (saved-search + pane-bookmark)
- Tick 171: 6 (notification + vacuum/checkpoint)
- Tick 172: 8 (token-lifecycle + mux-session)
- Tick 173: 7 (account + reservation + action-undo)
- Tick 174: 5 (hot-path singletons: record_event,
  record_audit_action, insert_approval_token, upsert_pane,
  insert_step_log)
- Total: 38 / ~60+ (63%)

Verified via fork bypass: 496/496 storage:: tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
